sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53913" key="katadih/ghsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταδιήγησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n53913.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pure narrative</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Fortunat.Rh.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
